commit_scope: Add a Form-native code generation and tool-use learning sideband so coding turns can emit native training samples, tool plans, CHOICE-RECEIPT outcomes, token cost, and metadata for A/B learning against external agents.

commands: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/nearest-shape.fk form-stdlib/classifier-eval.fk form-stdlib/tool-channel.fk form-stdlib/choice-receipt.fk form-stdlib/branch-choice-order.fk form-stdlib/choice-receipt-learning.fk form-stdlib/oracle-catalog.fk form-stdlib/code-tool-learning.fk form-stdlib/tests/code-tool-learning-band.fk
local_validation.notes: Prompt guide passed in dirty continuation mode; wellness had no required repair. code-tool-learning returned verdict 131071 and validate.sh printed fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way (fkwu + pre-flattened tables). The proof covers native code-generation intent learning, tool-selection intent learning, proof-execution intent learning, metadata-gated tool planning, low-metadata plan refusal, six A/B candidates (Form-native, Codex, Claude, Grok, Gemini, Ollama), valid CHOICE-RECEIPT with token cost, receipt-to-sample learning, >50 metadata floor, autonomous sovereignty/trust gate, receipt learning that makes the Form-native candidate win, output envelope metadata, explicit compiler/source-grounding oracle evidence requests through oracle-catalog, a named natural-language-to-host-native-ASM north-star intent, a floor-oracle winner rule where Form-native wins by using fewer LLM tokens, less energy, less nutrition, and higher sovereignty/trust/confidence, and an explicit lowering path catalog whose canonical path is natural language -> Form/BML/domain grammar -> form binary -> Form-to-host-native ASM.

deploy_validation.summary: Local Form proof only. No public deploy was requested or performed in this step.

phase_gate.gate: Coding/tool-use turns must produce explicit native receipts before a Form-native candidate can replace external LLM/tool choices on important lanes.
phase_gate.next: Attach the sideband to the real agent execution loop so patch generation, search/edit/tool plans, validation commands, and review/deploy actions emit code-tool receipts. Build heldout tasks for search, edit, proof, review, and deploy, then A/B Form-native candidates against Codex, Claude, Grok, Gemini, and Ollama before promoting any lane.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Cells and recipes now have a four-way-proven sideband where code generation, tool selection, and tool execution can be learned from receipt data with metadata-gated Form-native promotion.
test_flows: Code-generation, tool-selection, and proof-execution intents classify through native exemplars.
Tool planning returns an explicit stream:read grep plan only when metadata clears the >50 floor.
A CHOICE-RECEIPT carries selected path, outcome, token cost, witness trace, and value metadata.
Compiler and source-grounding oracle evidence lanes are requestable through oracle-catalog.
Natural-language-to-host-native-ASM intent is learned as a native exemplar and tied to compiler oracle evidence.
Form-native floor oracle wins when it clears the metadata gate with lower LLM token, energy, and nutrition cost plus higher sovereignty/trust/confidence.
Natural-language-to-host-native-ASM lowering has a canonical Form/BML/domain grammar -> form binary -> host-native ASM path plus alternate BML/Hati, domain-tool-native, and C-oracle paths.
Receipt learning can move the A/B race toward the Form-native candidate.
The output envelope carries candidate, tool plan, receipt, and conviction/certainty/frequency/aliveness/sovereignty/trust metadata.
e2e_validation.summary: This is a native learning/proof sideband, not a claim that Form can already replace external code-generation agents broadly. It gives the agent CLI the evidence lane needed to train, A/B test, and promote Form-native candidates lane by lane.
